description:
Gives agents an isolated Daytona cloud sandbox for running code and shell commands.
Provides run_code, run_command, upload_file and download_file on one shared ephemeral sandbox.

api_url.description: Daytona API endpoint. Leave empty for the default cloud (https://app.daytona.io/api); set for self-hosted Daytona.
api_url.title: API URL

auto_stop_minutes.description: Sandbox stops (and, being ephemeral, deletes itself) after this many minutes of inactivity: the cost safety net if cleanup is missed.
auto_stop_minutes.title: Auto-stop (minutes)

exec_timeout_secs.description: Max seconds a single run_code/run_command call may take.
exec_timeout_secs.title: Execution Timeout (seconds)

language.description: Language runtime for run_code in the sandbox.
language.title: Language

max_output_chars.description: Output longer than this is truncated before being returned to the agent.
max_output_chars.title: Max Output (characters)

snapshot.description: Daytona snapshot to create the sandbox from. Leave empty for the default snapshot.
snapshot.title: Snapshot

target.description: Sandbox region, e.g. "us" or "eu". Leave empty for the organization default.
target.title: Target Region

title: Daytona
